    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    R

    random - Variable in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
     
    randomMove(List<Node[]>) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Selects a random move from the given list of moves.
    randomRemoval(List<Node>) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Randomly selects and removes a node from the provided list of removable nodes.
    redoMove() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Redoes a move, restoring the state that was undone prior, if there is a move to redo.
    redoMove() - Methode in Klasse persistance.History
    Redoes the last undone move by popping it from the redo stack and pushing it back onto the undo stack.
    redoMoves - Variable in Klasse persistance.GameStateData
     
    redoMoves - Variable in Klasse persistance.History
     
    removeListener - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    removeMillThreat(List<Node>, List<Node[]>, ImaginativePlayer) - Methode in Klasse difficulties.DifficultyStrategy
    Identifies and returns the most strategic stone to remove from the opponent.
    removeMode - Variable in Klasse view.GUIBoard
     
    removeObserver(Observer) - Methode in Klasse view.Observable
    Removes a previously registered observer from this observable.
    removeStone() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.Node
    Removes the assigned stone from this node.
    removeStone(Stone) - Methode in Klasse players.PlayerEntity
    Removes a stone from the player.
    removeStone(PlayerEntity, Node) - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Removes a Stone from the specified target Node if the removal is valid according to the game rules.
    reset() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.BoardManager
    Resets the game board to its initial state.
    reset() - Methode in Klasse view.GUI
    Resets the game state and the GUI components to their initial state.
    resetGame() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Resets the game and prepares it to be started again.
    resetState() - Methode in Klasse view.GUIBoard
    Resets the state of the GUIBoard, clearing any selected nodes and removing the dragged stone.
    resetTimer() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.TurnTimer
    Stops the timer, resets the remaining thinking time and starts the timer again.
    restoreGameState(File) - Methode in Klasse persistance.GamePersistenceManager
    Loads a saved game state from a JSON-File and restores it.
    ruleManager - Variable in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
     
    ruleManager - Variable in Klasse players.ImaginativePlayer
     
    RuleManager - Klasse in boardLogic
    The RuleManager is responsible for checking the validity of moves and managing game rules.
    RuleManager() - Konstruktor für Klasse boardLogic.RuleManager
     
    runGame() - Methode in Klasse boardLogic.GameManager
    Controls the game loop, alternating between players and handling their moves.
